name: Moment Group AB
summary: Moment Group AB, together with its subsidiaries, operates in the entertainment industry in Sweden, Norway, Denmark, and Germany. The company operates through Live Entertainment, Immersive Venues, and Event segments. It produces theatrical events, musicals, shows, and concerts, as well as operates a venue for dinner shows; and arranges artist bookings for corporate customers. The company also owns and operates SHOWTIC.se, an e-commerce site that markets and sells tickets of live entertainment and venues. In addition, it develops and executes corporate entertainment, meetings, events, and brand engagement activities; and involved in bowling, as well as food and beverage business. The company was formerly known as 2E Group AB (publ) and changed its name to Moment Group AB in February 2017. Moment Group AB was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Gothenburg, Sweden.
